title: ISic003198. Epitaph of Prigomenia
body:
Text encoding: Jonathan Prag
1Πριγομένια χρη-
2[στ]ὰ κὲ ἄμεμπτε κὲ
3[πι]στὴ κ̣[ὲ] ἀμίμη
4{μη}τος ἔζησε ἔτη [---]

l.1 reg., orig. Πριγομένια

Text encoding: Jonathan Prag
1ΠΡΙΓΟΜΕΝΙΑΧΡΗ
2[..]ΑΚΕΑΜΕΜΠΤΕΚΕ
3[..]ΣΤΗ.[.]ΑΜΙΜΗ
4ΜΗΤΟΣΕΖΗΣΕΕΤΗ[---]

l.1 reg., orig. Πριγομένια

Facsimile Images

Apparatus criticus

  • Text after Ferrua and Rizzone, compared to Pace's drawing;
  • 1-2: Rizzone: χρη-|σ[τ]ὰ
  • 2: Rizzone: ἄμεμπτος
  • 3: Ferrua: χρηστιανὴ('forse')
  • 4: Rizzone: ἔζησεν

English translation

Jonathan Prag

Prigomenia, worthy and blameless and faithful and inimitable, lived [..] years

Italian translation

Prigomenia, buona ed irreprensibile e fedele e inimitabile, visse anni [...]

commentary

  • Rizzone 2014-2015 71 no.1 fig.1 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10001626

Lunate epsilon and sigma.

Line 1-4 25 Interlineation line 1 to 2
